pr.title: Include failure details in CI analysis issues

failed_jobs.name: Tests / Cli / Cli (macos-latest)
failed_jobs.reason: The single failing test AppHostLauncherTests.LaunchDetachedAsync_CleansUpChildProcessWhenCancelledAfterStart is a known flaky test on macOS (tracked in issue #18838). The PR only modifies CI workflow files and infrastructure tests, not CLI AppHostLauncher code.
